vllm.title: [Frontend] Refactor prompt processing
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR refactors various parts of the OpenAI-compatible server:

The _validate_prompt_and_tokenize method has been decomposed so that prompt and prompt_ids are processed separately.
The logging of prompt and prompt_ids has been moved from vllm.AsyncLLMEngine to vllm.entrypoints.logger.RequestLogger

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Kernel] Use int64_t for indices in fp8 quant kernels
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Running neuralmagic/Mistral-Nemo-Instruct-2407-FP8, we are accessing an illegal memory address because our loop counters over the number of elements are int32_t, and the model has a maximum sequence length of 1 million.
Let's change these to int64_t. We should also strongly consider compiling with -

vllm.title: [ci] Use different sccache bucket for CUDA 11.8 wheel build
vllm.author: khluu

vllm.title: [Core] Support dynamically loading Lora adapter from HuggingFace
vllm.author: Jeffwan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enhances the flexibility of LoRa adapter artifact locations. It allows users to specify the location using either a relative path or a Hugging Face model id.
part of #6275

If it's a relative path, it will try to expanduser and resolve to an absolute path. Resolve #6231 and
If it's a remote

vllm.title: [ci][build] add back vim in docker
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: vim helps debugging and modifying code inside docker containers.

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove deprecation warning for beam search
vllm.author: WoosukKwon

vllm.title: [Core] Modulize prepare input and attention metadata builder
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR further refactors model input builder and attention metadata builder to be more modulized and maintainable. Specifically:

Introduce an inner data class to encapsulate intermediate data.
Put the logic of processing a particular feature (e.g., prefix caching, sliding windows, lora, mm, etc) t

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix null `modules_to_not_convert`  in FBGEMM Fp8 quantization
vllm.author: cli99
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
This PR fixes the bug in the FBGEMM Fp8 quantization where "modules_to_not_convert": null. Without this fix, the current check on layer skipping results in error due to in self.ignore_list.

vllm.title: [Misc] Enable chunked prefill by default for long context models
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR enables chunked prefill by default for long context (>32K) models, to avoid possible OOM errors during the initial memory profiling.

vllm.title: [misc] add start loading models for users information
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: lessons learned from #6636 , adds a logging information to let users know it is loading model.

vllm.title: add tqdm when loading checkpoint shards
vllm.author: zhaotyer
vllm.bodyExcerpt: When we load a model with relatively large parameters, it takes a long time due to IO limitations, but we cannot see the model loading progress.In addition, sometimes some weight files of the model are missing, but vllm can still load successfully, but the answers will be garbled, so I added tqdm to

vllm.title: [Misc] Support FP8 kv cache scales from compressed-tensors
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adding the logic for loading models with quantized kv cache scales, generated using compressed-tensors framework.

CompressedTensorsConfig now has an optional kv_cache_scheme argument. As of the next compressed-tensors release, the key contains the information about the properties of the quantized k

vllm.title: [doc][distributed] add more doc for setting up multi-node environment
vllm.author: youkaichao

vllm.title: [Misc] Manage HTTP connections in one place
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds vllm.connections.HTTP_CONNECTION so that we can reuse the same sync/async client session. It also encapsulates the boilerplate code for common uses of requests and aiohttp libraries.

vllm.title: [misc] only tqdm for first rank
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
before:

Loading pt checkpoint shards:   0%|                                                                                                 | 0/1 [00:00<?, ?it/s]Loading pt checkpoint shards:   0%|          | 0/1 [00:00<?, ?it/s]

vllm.title: [VLM][Model] Support image input for Chameleon
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is a follow-up to #5770 that adds image + text -> text support for Chameleon. Current implementation only allows one image per request.
FIXES #5721
